requirement_source: PRD: orvex-studio-identity (cnhla0qRRF, draft — carries USER-locked decisions D-IDENT-1..6/D-S3/5/12/13/17) + Architecture: orvex-studio-identity (dQUjrSXhdp, canonical)

epics.title: [EPIC] identity: Verification spine & shared lib/auth verifier

stories.title: [identity] Multi-issuer IdentityResolver → IdP-agnostic principal
[identity] orvex-studio-lib/auth local JWKS verifier (deny-by-default)
[identity] POST /v1/introspect + Redis-cached introspection cadence
[identity] Fail-closed grace hard-bound + fresh-introspect gate + push-revocation
[identity] Mint frozen-at-mint MCP/agent tokens per IdP + org-switch immutability test
[identity] POST /v1/tokens from both front ends (CSRF/origin + first-party proof)
[identity] Server-side scope derivation + lib/auth scope enforcement
[identity] Token lifecycle list/rotate/revoke + revocation event within TTL

epics.title: [EPIC] identity: Polymorphic tenant spine & JIT provisioning

stories.title: [identity] Tenant registry — idp-tagged polymorphic user|org mapping, opaque IDs
[identity] Gated, rate-limited JIT provisioning
[identity] Personal→Teams upgrade pass (org mint + tenant re-key) + access-transition isolation
[identity] Coarse role mapping (Clerk org_role → workspace role enum)

epics.title: [EPIC] identity: Engine session seam & dual-IdP login

stories.title: [identity] POST /v1/exchange — Clerk verify → exchange-token → engine session mint (FR-15)
[identity] Remove native engine email/password login (D-S3), preserve survivors
[identity] Offline-sealed break-glass admin credential (console-only)
[identity] Keycloak OIDC-RP relocation (sever @docmost/* imports)
[identity] SCIM 2.0 relocation (Users/Groups + SCIM tokens)
[identity] Admin surfaces relocation behind admin-org authz
[identity] Studio provision/deprovision step API + workload identity (mTLS/SPIFFE) + NetworkPolicy
[identity] Two-phase deprovision(delete): soft-disable + grace-gated purge, no existence oracle
[identity] Transactional outbox + relay direct-to-Kafka + CloudEvents orvexcell envelope
[identity] Reconcile deprovisioner ownership (F2): retire CloudEvent worker, REST callee only

epics.title: [EPIC] identity: Global org→cell registry & routing (the only global component)

stories.title: [identity] Two schema-isolated registry stores — PII-free routing core + in-jurisdiction sensitive shard
[identity] Cell assignment at creation (geo + residency) + global hostname uniqueness
[identity] Workers KV mirror + edge geo-router read path (no routing SPOF)
[identity] Typed tenant-move step API + TenantMoveManifest + TENANT_MOVE.md
[identity] ADR-0011 #4 mint side — mirror cell/cell_epoch into Clerk org/user metadata + the Keycloak mapper (config-as-code)

epics.title: [EPIC] identity: CLI & agent client seam (Orvex CLI)

stories.title: [identity] GET /v1/whoami — token-verify + caller principal
[identity] Device-authorization / token-grant mint flow for orvex auth login
[identity] /healthz doctor probe alias + interim engine api-key passthrough

epics.title: [EPIC] identity: Persistence, cell-contract conformance & security ops

stories.title: [identity] Persistence — Postgres RLS + JSONB append journal + Redis (Mongo struck)
[identity] livez/readyz split + CELL_ID-required + CLUSTER_NAME echo
[identity] Cell-guard/421 middleware + Idempotency-Key on internal step APIs
[identity] OTel/Prometheus + audit stream for every mint/revoke/provision
[identity] Author A-TOKEN/A-VERIFY + A-SESSION ADRs (SE-Arch §7 triggers)
[identity] ADR-0015 ruling 7a — at-rest encryption helper (OpenBao/ESO-sourced key) for the DB-backed per-tenant Clerk config
[identity] verified_principal entity + principal-scoped lifetime AI-trial ledger (flagship)
[identity] Per-principal live-tenant cap + progressive-trust tiers + staged provisioning
[identity] Table-stakes edge controls (verified-email, disposable-block, Turnstile, IP/ASN, velocity)
[identity] Signup risk-score fusion → ALLOW/STEP-UP/DENY + risk-triggered step-up
[identity] BYOK customer-managed keys via KMS (store-layer enforced, per-tenant)
[identity] SOC 2 Type II + HIPAA BAA compliance path
[identity] Self-host / BYOC data-residency option
[identity] Personal↔employer firewall + per-use consent + AD-8 mint-boundary delivery token
